title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Serve as a key partner for Sales and RevOps, providing dashboards, reporting tools, and regional insights to optimize territory performance. Redesign territory models for global scalability, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance to optimize territory composition, and support GTM planning cycles with assignments and whitespace analysis. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and CRM proficiency, especially Salesforce. Comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience aligns perfectly with territory strategy, Salesforce proficiency, pipeline forecasting expertise, and GTM optimization requirements. Remote US role accommodates global work preferences.
ai_opener: Omri—I came across Gong's RevOps Manager opening and immediately recognized this as a natural fit for your background. Your 15+ years optimizing B2B SaaS GTM, combined with deep Salesforce and pipeline forecasting expertise, directly addresses their need to redesign global territory models and drive scalability. Given Gong's scale and complexity, your experience architecting go-to-market operations would be invaluable in partnering with Sales leadership to maximize territory performance.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems (New Verticals)
location: New York / San Francisco / Salt Lake City (Hybrid) or Remote
description: Build and own the Salesforce environment for New Verticals—objects, fields, flows, and automations tailored to non-rent split-pay sales motions. Design revenue tech stack integrations, establish system architecture standards, and architect the sales process from lead-to-close. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Operations with at least 2 years in a senior/lead capacity, deep Salesforce expertise (Admin Certification preferred), and experience standing up RevOps infrastructure. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot Marketing. Builder mentality energized by creating from zero.

Remote eligibility and senior-level experience in GTM operations are strong matches; only minor gap is no explicit mention of Outreach/LeanData/Clay in background.
ai_opener: I've spent 15 years scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS—from architecting Salesforce environments for high-velocity sales motions to designing pipeline forecasting systems that actually stick. Your Revenue Operations Manager role building out Flex's New Verticals from scratch resonates with me: I thrive in that 'zero to system' space where you own the entire tech stack and sales process design. Given the split-pay GTM motion you're supporting, I'd love to discuss how I've handled similar non-standard sales process architecture.

Remote US location is acceptable, and B2B SaaS security/vulnerability management is an ideal vertical fit.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As GTM Engineer, you'll replace manual workflows and patchwork SaaS tools with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows that compound over time.
